data.reasoningText: The user wants to run their tests with `dotnet test` and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host. Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the tests with the appropriate blame-crash options.

toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-a728b2220eee4c77aa76ea370be91b7b && dotnet test --blame-crash", "description": "Run tests with blame-crash to collect crash dumps", "initial_wait": 60}

data.content:
Tests passed. Here's the command:

```
dotnet test --blame-crash
```

This enables the blame-crash data collector. If a test crashes the host process, it will automatically generate a crash dump in the `TestResults` directory. All tests passed successfully in this case, so no dump was collected.
